name: Devils Diciples Motorcycle Club
description: An outlaw motorcycle club founded in Fontana, California in 1967. The club has chapters across multiple U.S. states and is considered a second-tier outlaw motorcycle club by law enforcement. Members have been involved in firearms and narcotics offenses, including a major methamphetamine case in Detroit.
